name: @ai-sdk/huggingface
description: The **[Hugging Face Inference Providers](https://huggingface.co/docs/inference-providers/index)** for the [Vercel AI SDK](https://ai-sdk.dev/docs) contains language model support for thousands of models through multiple inference providers via the Hugging
